name: Generate quality commit messages using subagent
query: Create a commit for the changes I made to add email validation to the authentication system
setup_commands: # Assume changes are staged in auth/validator.go
expected_behavior: - Recent commits via git log --oneline for style reference
Spawns haiku subagent using Task tool with model: haiku
Subagent receives full context and generates message
Uses pipe format: echo 'message' | stackit create --no-interactive
quality_indicators: No placeholder text or TODO markers
anti_patterns: Generates commit message directly without haiku subagent
Uses main model (sonnet/opus) for message generation
Generic messages like 'update file' or 'fix bug'
Uses 'git commit' directly instead of stackit
